title: The Art of Prompt Engineering
subtitle: Master the craft of communicating with AI — from techniques to API calls
heroTitle: The Art of Prompt Engineering

objectives.title: Master Prompt Engineering Fundamentals
objectives.description: Learn core techniques: zero-shot, few-shot, chain-of-thought, role prompting, and structured outputs.

objectives.title: Apply the CRAFT Framework
objectives.description: Use Context, Role, Action, Format, and Tone to write prompts that get consistent, high-quality results.

objectives.title: Make Your First API Call
objectives.description: Understand how APIs work and connect to Claude programmatically using Python.

objectives.title: Build Something Real
objectives.description: Create a working AI-powered application — email analyzer, meeting summarizer, or product description generator.

agenda.title: Part 1: Prompt Engineering Fundamentals
agenda.description: Why prompt clarity matters. Transform vague requests into precise instructions.
bulletPoints: Live demo: Weak vs strong prompts — same task, dramatically different results
The 6 core techniques: zero-shot, few-shot, chain-of-thought, role, structured output, chaining
Why explicit beats implicit every time

agenda.title: Part 2: The CRAFT Framework
agenda.description: A memorable system for writing effective prompts every time.
bulletPoints: C = Context: Background and situation
R = Role: Who the AI should be
A = Action: What to do
F = Format: How to structure output
T = Tone: Voice and style
Live transformation of real prompts using CRAFT

agenda.title: Part 3: Prompt Reflection Lab
agenda.description: Analyze your own AI conversations and discover your prompting patterns.
bulletPoints: Paste your real AI conversation logs into the AI Collaboration Analyzer
Get scored across 6 dimensions: Clarity, Context, Structure, Iteration, Critical Thinking, Efficiency
Discover your AI Collaboration Level: Novice, Developing, Skilled, or Master
Partner discussion: What surprised you? What will you change?

agenda.title: Break
agenda.description: Stretch, grab coffee, let the concepts settle.

agenda.title: Part 4: API Integration
agenda.description: From chat interface to code — how to build AI into real applications.
bulletPoints: What is an API? (Software talking to software)
Anatomy of an API call: model, messages, tokens, temperature, system prompts
Live demo: Your first API call to Claude
Understanding costs: tokens, pricing, and ROI thinking

agenda.title: Part 5: Build Your Application
agenda.description: Hands-on Google Colab workshop — build a real AI-powered tool.
bulletPoints: Open the pre-built Colab notebook
Choose your project: Email Tone Analyzer, Meeting Summarizer, or Product Description Generator
Apply the CRAFT framework programmatically
Test, iterate, and refine your prompts

agenda.title: Part 6: Prompt Battle Royale
agenda.description: Competition time! Who can craft the best prompt for a given task?
bulletPoints: Challenge: Write a prompt that generates a compelling LinkedIn post
Judging criteria: Prompt structure, output quality, creativity
Winner gets bragging rights (and maybe extra credit)

agenda.title: Part 7: Wrap-Up & Preview
agenda.description: Key takeaways, homework, and what's coming next.
bulletPoints: 4 key insights to remember
Download the Prompt Engineering Cheat Sheet
Homework overview
Preview: AI Agents & Workflows in Session 4

resources.title: Prompt Engineering Cheat Sheet
resources.description: Print-ready one-page reference with CRAFT framework, techniques, Quick Wins, and API basics. Keep it next to your computer!

resources.title: Colab Workshop Notebook
resources.description: Hands-on notebook for building your first AI application. Includes Email Analyzer, Meeting Summarizer, and Product Description Generator.

resources.title: Anthropic Documentation
resources.description: Official documentation for Claude API. The source of truth for building with Claude.

resources.title: API Console
resources.description: Get your API key, monitor usage, and manage billing for Claude API access.

resources.title: Prompting Guide
resources.description: Comprehensive resource covering all prompt engineering techniques with examples and research.

resources.title: Anthropic Cookbook
resources.description: Code examples and recipes for common Claude use cases. Perfect for reference.

activities.title: Prompt Reflection Lab
activities.description: Paste your real AI conversation logs into the AI Collaboration Analyzer and discover your prompting patterns:

steps.title: Grab 2-3 real AI conversations
steps.description: From claude.ai, ChatGPT, or any LLM. Copy the full chat (your prompts + AI responses).

steps.title: Use the Analyzer Prompt
steps.description: Copy the AI Collaboration Analyzer prompt (in class materials) into a new chat session and paste your logs.

steps.title: Get your AI Collaboration Level
steps.description: Receive scores across 6 dimensions and your level: Novice, Developing, Skilled, or Master.

steps.title: Reflect with a partner
steps.description: Discuss: What surprised you? What's your biggest strength? What will you change?

activities.title: Prompt Transformation Challenge
activities.description: Take weak prompts and transform them using the CRAFT framework:

steps.title: Start with a weak prompt
steps.description: "Help me with a presentation" or "Write me an email"

steps.title: Apply CRAFT
steps.description: Add Context, Role, Action, Format, and Tone systematically.

steps.title: Compare outputs
steps.description: Run both prompts and see the dramatic difference in quality.

activities.title: Build Your AI Application
activities.description: Use Google Colab to make real API calls and build a working AI-powered tool:

steps.title: Open the Colab notebook
steps.description: Pre-configured with everything you need to get started.

steps.title: Add your API key
steps.description: Use class-provided credits or your own Anthropic API key.

steps.title: Choose your app
steps.description: Email Tone Analyzer, Meeting Summarizer, Product Description Generator, or your own idea!

steps.title: Test & iterate
steps.description: Refine your prompts until the output is production-quality.

activities.title: Prompt Battle Royale
activities.description: Competition time! Given a task, who can craft the prompt that produces the best output?

codeBlock.code:
Write a prompt that generates a compelling LinkedIn post
announcing a new AI feature at your (fictional) company.

Requirements:
- Professional yet engaging tone
- Under 200 words
- Includes a call-to-action

Judging: Clarity of prompt structure, quality of output,
creativity, and adherence to constraints.

takeaways.text: Clarity beats cleverness. Explicit instructions outperform vague requests every single time.
CRAFT is your friend. Context, Role, Action, Format, Tone — a framework for consistent results.
Iterate, iterate, iterate. Great prompts are refined through experimentation, not written perfectly the first time.
APIs unlock applications. Move from chat to building real products with AI.

homework.label: Practice:
homework.text: Write 5 prompts using the CRAFT framework for real tasks in your life or work. Document the before/after quality difference.

homework.label: Build:
homework.text: Complete the Colab notebook. Successfully make 3 different API calls with different prompts.

homework.label: Read:
homework.text: Browse the Anthropic Cookbook on GitHub. Pick one example that interests you and understand how it works.

homework.label: Think:
homework.text: Identify a real business process at a company you know that could be improved with AI. Draft a proposal outline.

nextSession.title: Session 4: Building AI Agents & Workflows
nextSession.description: Take your skills further: chain prompts together, give Claude access to tools, and build AI systems that take action in the real world.
